title: Ptychomeria suaveolens
taxonomy: Ptychomeria suaveolens is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Ptychomeria, which consists of a limited number of species. Within the Cactaceae family, Ptychomeria suaveolens is placed in the subfamily Cactoideae, one of the largest and most diverse subfamilies of cacti. The species is native to Central and South America and is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations. Ptychomeria suaveolens is closely related to other cacti species within the Cactoideae subfamily, sharing similarities in morphology and distribution.
